hero.name: Milad Poshtkohi
hero.title: Fullstack Developer & Creative UI Designer
hero.description: I create modern, secure and visually magical web experiences. Focused on fullstack development, fantasy inspired UI and clean architecture.

about.title: About Me
about.text: I am a fullstack developer with a background in graphic design. I am passionate about creating clear, user‑friendly and well‑structured digital solutions. My strength lies in combining technical skills with visual thinking.

tech.title: Technologies I Work With
tech.text: During my studies at Nackademin, I have worked with modern open‑source technologies such as React, Node.js, Express and MongoDB. I build fullstack applications, develop REST APIs and create responsive interfaces with a focus on clean code and good UX.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Here I will showcase my fullstack projects from Nackademin and personal work. I have built applications using React, Node.js, Express and MongoDB, as well as developed REST APIs and responsive interfaces.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Want to get in touch with me? Feel free to reach out!
